晚餐 recipes

Hong Kong Quick easy

XO醬意粉

XO Sauce Pasta

💰
Budget
$80
⏱️
Time
15 min
👥
Serves
2 people
📊
Difficulty
easy
low-sugar

Quick and flavorful XO sauce pasta perfect for busy weeknights

🥗 Ingredients 材料

  • 1 200g pasta
  • 2 2 tbsp XO sauce
  • 3 1 shallot, sliced
  • 4 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 5 1 tbsp oyster sauce
  • 6 1 tsp sugar substitute
  • 7 2 tbsp vegetable oil
  • 8 Fresh cilantro for garnish

👨‍🍳 Steps 步驟

  1. 1 Cook pasta according to package directions, drain and set aside.
  2. 2 Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Add shallot and garlic, stir-fry for 30 seconds.
  3. 3 Add XO sauce and oyster sauce, stir for 1 minute.
  4. 4 Add cooked pasta, toss well to coat evenly.
  5. 5 Add sugar substitute, toss for another minute.
  6. 6 Garnish with cilantro and serve immediately.

💡 Tips 提示

For a healthier version, use whole wheat pasta and reduce oil amount.
